name: Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup reduced-calorie margarine, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Mix margarine and cracker crumbs in a bowl until evenly moistened. Press into bottom and sides of a 9x3-inch springform pan.
3. In a food processor or blender, process cottage cheese and cream cheese product until thick and smooth. Add brown sugar and process until dissolved. Add eggs and egg whites and process just until blended. Transfer to a large bowl. Stir in pumpkin, cornstarch, spice, and vanilla until well blended and smooth.
4. Pour filling into crust.
5. Bake for 1 hour and 20 minutes or until the top of the cake is set (the center may jiggle). Turn off the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack. Cover and refrigerate in the pan at least 6 hours or up to 4 days.
6. To serve, run a knife around the edge of the cake. Remove the sides of the pan. Place the cake on a serving plate. Garnish with caramelize pecan halves.
Makes 18 servings. Each serving contains approximately 234 calories, 9 grams protein, 31 grams carbohydrates, 8 grams fat, and 44 milligrams cholesterol.
